title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.62.0 - autoclosed
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.62.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.62.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.61.1...v0.62.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to c/storage v1.56.0, c/image v5.33.0, and c/common v0.61.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2242](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2242)
-   PerNetworkOptions: add driver specific options by [@​M1cha](https://redirect.github.com/M1cha) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2245](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2245)
-   libimage tests: try to avoid docker.io images by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2250](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2250)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.2.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2248](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2248)
-   update ci image to f41 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2246](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2246)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/capability to v0.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2244](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2244)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.22.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2251](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2251)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2252](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2252)
-   libnetwork: support `mode` option for bridge by [@​M1cha](https://redirect.github.com/M1cha) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2247](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2247)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.36.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2253](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2253)
-   OWNERS: remove edsantiago by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2257](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2257)
-   Allow Podman to send the container's hostname to Netavark by [@​gtjoseph](https://redirect.github.com/gtjoseph) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2254](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2254)
-   Only reset compression if its not valid by [@​Jamstah](https://redirect.github.com/Jamstah) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2255](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2255)
-   libnetwork/pasta: do not ignore ipv4 link local by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2258](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2258)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2261](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2261)

-   config: drop /sys/dev/block from masked paths by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2278](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2278)

-   Add RamaLama logo by [@​ericcurtin](https://redirect.github.com/ericcurtin) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2303](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2303)
